meaning: n.粉红色,石竹花,化身,极致,精华adj.粉红的vt.刺,扎,刺痛,使变粉红色vi.变粉红色
examples: Her dress was a violent pink.
His face was a queer pink colour.
Fuchsia pink Bonita was home to bossa nova legend Tom Jobim from 1962 to 1965.
At the neon-pink-walled factory of Soul Stix Surfboards, in the surf ghetto of San Clemente, Calif.
